name: What time / what day single-intent
description: Two agents bidding on the same time-of-day interpretation. The pre-Phase-4 regex saw 'and' and let multi-winner through; the bid-overlap penalty notices the heavy reasoning overlap (both agents talk about 'current time') and shrinks calendar-agent's confidence. The dominance gap opens and the fast path picks time-agent.

task.content: what time is it and what day is it

bids.reasoning: I report the current time and current day from the system clock
I report the current time and day plus calendar events scheduled around now

expected.rationale: Both bids carry identical-intent reasoning (current time/day); calendar-agent shrinks; dominance gap opens past 0.3; fast path picks time-agent.
expected.postOverlapBehavior: Fast path fires; LLM not consulted.
